title: Threadlight Production Readiness — waiver file
description: Schema for tests/production-readiness-waivers.json — customer-accepted findings with required justification and compensating control.

id.description: Unique waiver ID within this file. Format: W-### (e.g., W-001).

finding_id.description: ID of the finding being waived. Must match a finding ID emitted by the skill (e.g., SEC-004, NET-501).

owner.description: Email of the person accountable for this waiver. NOT a distribution list.

expiry.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) after which the waiver is invalid. The skill ignores expired waivers and treats the underlying finding as un-waived.

justification.description: Why is this gap acceptable for the customer's risk posture? Free text, must be substantive (min 20 chars).

compensating_control.description: What offsetting control reduces the risk? Free text, must be substantive (min 20 chars).

accepted_risk.description: Plain-language summary of the residual risk being accepted. Free text, must be substantive (min 20 chars).

approver.description: Optional: name or role of the approver (e.g., 'CISO', 'Head of AI'). Defaults to owner if absent.

ticket_ref.description: Optional: reference to a ticket / change request (e.g., 'CR-12345').

waivers.description: List of accepted waivers. Each entry requires full justification + compensating control + accepted risk; otherwise the waiver is ignored and a WAIVER-INVALID finding is added to the report.
